mapper.sql: case h.change_type_code when 'M001' then '일감 생성' when 'M002' then '일감 수정' when 'M003' then '일감 삭제' when 'M004' then '파일 추가' when 'M005' then '파일 삭제' else h.change_type_code end

nvl(h.field_name, case h.field_code when 'ISSUE' then '일감' when 'TITLE' then '제목' when 'DESCRIPTION' then '설명' when 'STATUS' then '상태' when 'PRIORITY' then '우선순위' when 'ASSIGNEE' then '담당자' when 'PROGRESS_RATE' then '진척도' when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then '추정시간' when 'START_DATE' then '시작일' when 'DUE_DATE' then '완료기한' when 'MILESTONE' then '마일스톤' when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then '상위일감' when 'ATTACH_FILE' then '첨부파일' else h.field_code end)

sql.if: and ( to_char(i.issue_no) like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or '#' || lpad(to_char(i.issue_no), 4, '0') like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or lower(i.title) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' )

mapper.select: select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select * from ( select 'CHANGE_TYPE' as option_group, change_type_code as option_value, change_type_name as option_label, 1 as option_sort, row_sort from ( select 'M001' as change_type_code, '일감 생성' as change_type_name, 1 as row_sort from dual union all select 'M002', '일감 수정', 2 from dual union all select 'M003', '일감 삭제', 3 from dual union all select 'M004', '파일 추가', 4 from dual union all select 'M005', '파일 삭제', 5 from dual )
where change_type_code in
#{changeTypeCode}
where 1 = 0
union all
select distinct 'FIELD' as option_group, h.field_code as option_value, as option_label, 2 as option_sort, 1 as row_sort from issue_history h join issue i on h.issue_id = i.issue_id where i.project_id = #{projectId}
and h.field_code in
#{fieldCode}
and 1 = 0
union all
select 'CHANGED_BY' as option_group, u.user_id as option_value, u.user_name as option_label, 3 as option_sort, 1 as row_sort from users u where exists ( select 1 from issue_history h join issue i on h.issue_id = i.issue_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and h.changed_by = u.user_id )
and u.user_id in
#{changedBy}
and 1 = 0
union all
select 'ISSUE_TYPE' as option_group, it.issue_type_id as option_value, it.issue_type_name as option_label, 4 as option_sort, 1 as row_sort from issue_type it where exists ( select 1 from issue_history h join issue i on h.issue_id = i.issue_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id )
and it.issue_type_id in
#{issueTypeId}
and 1 = 0
union all
select 'STATUS' as option_group, ist.issue_status_id as option_value, ist.status_name as option_label, 5 as option_sort, 1 as row_sort from issue_status ist where exists ( select 1 from issue_history h join issue i on h.issue_id = i.issue_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id )
and ist.issue_status_id in
#{issueStatusId}
and 1 = 0
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, sc.setting_code_id as option_value, sc.setting_name as option_label, 6 as option_sort, 1 as row_sort from setting_code sc where exists ( select 1 from issue_history h join issue i on h.issue_id = i.issue_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.setting_code_id = sc.setting_code_id )
and sc.setting_code_id in
#{settingCodeId}
and 1 = 0
) order by option_sort, option_label

with project_history as ( select /*+ materialize leading(i) use_nl(h) index(i IDX_ISSUE_PROJECT_ID) index(h IDX_ISSUE_HISTORY_ISSUE_RECENT) */ h.change_type_code, h.field_code, h.field_name, h.changed_by, i.issue_type_id, i.issue_status_id, i.setting_code_id from issue i join issue_history h on h.issue_id = i.issue_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} ), change_type_options as ( select 'M001' as change_type_code, '일감 생성' as change_type_name, 1 as row_sort from dual union all select 'M002', '일감 수정', 2 from dual union all select 'M003', '일감 삭제', 3 from dual union all select 'M004', '파일 추가', 4 from dual union all select 'M005', '파일 삭제', 5 from dual ) select * from ( select 'CHANGE_TYPE' as option_group, ct.change_type_code as option_value, ct.change_type_name as option_label, 1 as option_sort, ct.row_sort from change_type_options ct where exists ( select 1 from project_history ph where ph.change_type_code = ct.change_type_code )
union all
select 'FIELD' as option_group, field_code as option_value, field_name as option_label, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by field_name, field_code) as row_sort from ( select distinct ph.field_code, nvl(ph.field_name, case ph.field_code when 'ISSUE' then '일감' when 'TITLE' then '제목' when 'DESCRIPTION' then '설명' when 'STATUS' then '상태' when 'PRIORITY' then '우선순위' when 'ASSIGNEE' then '담당자' when 'PROGRESS_RATE' then '진척도' when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then '추정시간' when 'START_DATE' then '시작일' when 'DUE_DATE' then '완료기한' when 'MILESTONE' then '마일스톤' when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then '상위일감' when 'ATTACH_FILE' then '첨부파일' else ph.field_code end) as field_name from project_history ph where ph.field_code is not null )
union all
select 'CHANGED_BY' as option_group, changed_by as option_value, changed_by_name as option_label, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by changed_by_name, changed_by) as row_sort from ( select distinct ph.changed_by, nvl(u.user_name, ph.changed_by) as changed_by_name from project_history ph left join users u on ph.changed_by = u.user_id where ph.changed_by is not null )
union all
select 'ISSUE_TYPE' as option_group, it.issue_type_id as option_value, it.issue_type_name as option_label, 4 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by it.issue_type_name, it.issue_type_id) as row_sort from ( select distinct issue_type_id from project_history where issue_type_id is not null ) ph join issue_type it on ph.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id
union all
select 'STATUS' as option_group, ist.issue_status_id as option_value, ist.status_name as option_label, 5 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by ist.issue_status_id) as row_sort from ( select distinct issue_status_id from project_history where issue_status_id is not null ) ph join issue_status ist on ph.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, sc.setting_code_id as option_value, sc.setting_name as option_label, 6 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id) as row_sort from ( select distinct setting_code_id from project_history where setting_code_id is not null ) ph join setting_code sc on ph.setting_code_id = sc.setting_code_id ) order by option_sort, row_sort
